copy.affordable_eligibility_bullets: ["Household income must meet published AMI limits for the unit size (income verification required)","Household size must match unit occupancy limits","Must be a U.S. citizen or meet HUD-eligible immigration status requirements","Complete application and pay any applicable application fee","Pass standard credit, criminal background, and rental history screening","Provide proof of current income (pay stubs, tax returns, benefit letters) and photo ID"]
copy.affordable_intro_body:
Terrapin offers a limited number of income-restricted units as part of our commitment to a diverse Bellevue community. These units are set aside for households who meet income and household size requirements. Eligibility is determined by area median income (AMI) guidelines and documentation review.

If you qualify, you may receive reduced rent on select apartments. Availability changes frequently; priority is given to complete applications that include all required income and household documentation.
copy.affordable_process_steps: ["Review AMI limits and unit sizes to confirm preliminary eligibility","Submit a complete affordable housing application with required income documentation","Application intake and initial eligibility verification by property management","Complete credit, criminal background, and rental reference checks","Receive notification of eligibility status or placement on waitlist/lottery if applicable","If approved, sign lease and provide any required deposits or documentation"]
copy.apartments_additional_text: Common areas at Terrapin include a resident lounge and outdoor seating where neighbors can connect, relax, or work outdoors. Select amenities may require reservation or membership.
copy.apartments_feature_1_text: Durable, modern materials—wood-style flooring, quartz-inspired counters, and efficient appliances—combine for a polished, low-maintenance home experience.
copy.apartments_feature_2_text: Thoughtfully placed windows and open sightlines bring abundant daylight into living areas, making rooms feel larger and more welcoming.
copy.apartments_feature_3_text: Layouts prioritize usable space with dedicated areas for work, dining, and relaxation—designed to fit busy daily routines and weekend downtime.
copy.apartments_hero_subheading: Contemporary layouts, efficient finishes, and thoughtful amenities designed for everyday living in Bellevue.
copy.apartments_intro_body:
Terrapin offers a range of well-appointed studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments across 172 units. Each home pairs durable, modern finishes with smart layouts that maximize space and natural light.

Select units include energy-efficient appliances, in-unit laundry, and flexible floor plans that adapt to work-from-home needs. Practical storage, quality fixtures, and attention to detail create comfortable living without compromise.
copy.community_additional_text: We share curated local guides highlighting nearby restaurants, parks, services, and transit options to help you take full advantage of Bellevue’s offerings.
copy.community_feature_1_text: Comfortable lounges and outdoor seating areas provide casual spots to meet neighbors, work remotely, or unwind after a busy day.
copy.community_feature_2_text: Occasional resident meetups and seasonal gatherings help neighbors get to know one another and build a supportive community.
copy.community_feature_3_text: Our on-site team handles maintenance requests quickly and provides leasing support so your residency is smooth from move-in onward.
copy.community_hero_subheading: A neighborly setting with convenient access to parks, shopping, and transit in Bellevue.
copy.community_intro_body:
Terrapin fosters a calm, connected residential environment where convenience meets everyday comfort. Our team focuses on responsive service and practical amenities so you can spend more time enjoying the neighborhood.

From shared seating areas to community notices and curated local recommendations, we make it easy to plug into life in Bellevue.
copy.contact_form_success_message: Thanks — we received your message. Our leasing team will reply within one business day.
copy.contact_intro_body: Have questions about availability, floor plans, or the leasing process? Our leasing team is available to answer questions and schedule tours. We’re here to help you find the right Terrapin home.
copy.contact_tour_body: See Terrapin in person—schedule a private tour to view available floor plans and amenities. Tours are available by appointment; we can accommodate weekday evenings and weekend viewings upon request.
copy.contact_tour_success_message: Your tour request is confirmed. Check your email for appointment details and arrival instructions.
copy.global_legal_equal_housing_text: Terrapin is an equal housing opportunity provider. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, familial status, or any other protected characteristic.
copy.global_legal_fair_housing_footer_text: Equal Housing Opportunity. This property complies with fair housing laws and provides housing without discrimination on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.
copy.global_meta_description: Discover Terrapin: 172 modern apartments in Bellevue with efficient finishes, practical amenities, and easy access to parks, shopping, and transit.
copy.global_meta_title: Terrapin Bellevue | Modern Multi-Family Living in Bellevue
copy.global_parking_policy_summary: Assigned on-site parking is available for an additional monthly fee. Limited visitor parking and EV charging stations available. Parking assignments are subject to availability.
copy.global_pet_policy_summary: Cats and dogs are welcome. Maximum of two pets per apartment. Breed and weight restrictions apply. Pet deposit and monthly pet rent required; proof of vaccinations and registration may be requested.
copy.global_screening_critical_info: All applicants must present a valid photo ID and provide income verification for the most recent 30–60 days. Tours are by appointment. Some units and amenities may have additional fees; assigned parking is limited and not guaranteed without a signed parking agreement.
copy.global_screening_rental_criteria: Minimum credit score: 620 (exceptions reviewed case-by-case). Gross household income should be at least 2.5x the monthly rent. No evictions within the past 5 years. Applicants must pass a criminal background check and provide two landlord or personal references. Application fee and consent for background/credit checks required. Co-signers may be accepted with documented qualifying income.
copy.global_tagline: Contemporary multi-family living in Bellevue’s northeast neighborhood
copy.home_affordable_text: We offer a limited number of income-restricted units for qualifying households. Availability varies; apply to learn about current eligibility and waitlist procedures.
copy.home_closer_text: Schedule a tour or contact leasing to learn more about available homes, amenities, and our resident experience.
copy.home_hero_subheading: Modern multi-family living with convenient access to Bellevue’s parks, retail, and transit.
copy.home_highlight_apartments_text: Choose from studios, one-, and two-bedroom homes with contemporary finishes, practical storage, and layouts designed for modern lifestyles.
copy.home_highlight_community_text: Shared lounges, outdoor seating, and resident communications create a connected, low-key community environment.
copy.home_highlight_neighborhood_text: Minutes from shopping, parks, and frequent bus routes. Enjoy quick access to downtown Bellevue and nearby green spaces for errands and recreation.
copy.home_intro_body:
Located near Bellevue’s vibrant offerings, Terrapin blends modern apartment design with everyday convenience. Our 172-unit community emphasizes efficient layouts, practical amenities, and a calm residential atmosphere.

Whether you’re seeking easy access to shopping and dining or a quiet place to call home, Terrapin delivers functional spaces and a friendly leasing team.
copy.home_pitch_1_text: Modern finishes and efficient layouts deliver comfortable, low-maintenance homes tailored to everyday needs.
copy.home_pitch_2_text: Close proximity to shopping, dining, and parks makes errands and recreation simple and convenient.
copy.home_pitch_3_text: A responsive on-site team helps ensure maintenance and leasing needs are handled promptly and professionally.
copy.listings_intro_body: Browse current availability to find a home that fits your needs. Listings include floor plans, square footage, and details on move-in availability. If nothing matches today, ask about our waitlist.
copy.listings_no_availability_message: We’re currently at capacity. Join our waitlist or contact leasing to be notified when units become available.
copy.listings_pre_screening_text: All applicants must submit a completed application and supporting documents. Application fee applies. Applicants will undergo credit, criminal background, and rental history screening; please confirm you meet minimum income and credit guidelines before applying.
copy.neighborhood_feature_blocks: [{"title":"Downtown Bellevue","text":"A short drive or transit trip brings you to Bellevue’s dining, shopping, and entertainment core, including Bellevue Square and local restaurants."},{"title":"Parks & Trails","text":"Close proximity to neighborhood parks and trails makes it easy to enjoy outdoor time—walking, jogging, or weekend picnics."},{"title":"Shopping & Services","text":"Grocery stores, pharmacies, and essential services are located nearby for quick, convenient errands."},{"title":"Transit Connections","text":"Frequent bus lines and regional routes connect you to neighboring cities and major employment centers across the Eastside."}]
copy.neighborhood_hero_subheading: Live near Bellevue’s shops, parks, and transit with easy access to everything the city offers.
copy.neighborhood_intro_body: Terrapin sits in a convenient Bellevue neighborhood with quick connections to retail corridors, neighborhood parks, and everyday services. Enjoy access to dining, grocery options, and green spaces within a short drive or walk.
copy.neighborhood_transit_text: Frequent bus service connects Terrapin to downtown Bellevue and regional transit hubs. Major routes and easy freeway access make commuting straightforward.
copy.neighborhood_walkability_text: Very walkable for daily errands—cafés, convenience shopping, and nearby parks are within comfortable walking distance from the property.

listings.marketingTitle: Terrapin - Discover Elevated Living in the Heart of Downtown Bellevue
listings.marketingDescription:
Welcome to Bellevue’s newest high-rise community—where modern design, upscale comfort, and unmatched convenience come together. Choose from stylish studios, spacious one- and two-bedroom homes, or unique lofted floorplans designed to complement your lifestyle. Nearly every home features the added convenience of an in-unit washer and dryer, along with must-have essentials like a full-sized refrigerator, dishwasher, and complete stove package. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame incredible natural light and sweeping city views, creating a bright, inviting space to call home.

Step outside your door and enjoy a suite of exceptional amenities. A state-of-the-art parking garage makes coming and going effortless, while the fully equipped fitness center supports your wellness routine. Entertain or unwind on the rooftop, complete with a modern kitchen and panoramic vistas. With onsite management and maintenance, plus valet trash service, every detail is designed for ease and comfort.

Live steps from Bellevue’s premier dining, shopping, and entertainment—where luxury meets convenience, and home meets possibility. Welcome to your next-level living experience.
